# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release of this plugin is supported with security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Instead, use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting: open the [Security tab](https://github.com/GaryJones/plugin-slug/security) and choose __Report a vulnerability__. Include as much detail as you can, such as steps to reproduce and the affected versions.

You'll receive an acknowledgement as soon as possible, and we'll keep you informed as the report is investigated and resolved.
